name: BECOME THE DEVIL
short_description: Two college students travel to a remote area to interview the owner of a resort. Along the way, locals warn them to stay away from the people at the resort. Since the new owner moved in, strange incidents have frequently occurred. The locals suspect something terrifying must be lurking in the resort
detailed_description:
Become the Devil is a horror game that features combat, escape, stealth, and bomb planting systems. The game also incorporates deep life philosophies within its storyline.


Synopsis
Two college students travel to a remote area to interview the owner of a large resort. Along the way, locals warn them not to get involved with the people at the resort. Since the new owner moved in, the area has been plagued by numerous strange events, with many people mysteriously disappearing. The locals suspect that something sinister must be happening at the resort, but no one dares to investigate. As a result, the town is nearly deserted, becoming almost like a ghost town.

Key Features

Combat, bomb planting, escaping, and stealth systems
VHS film aesthetic
Receive texts from NPCs
Player voice activity
